source: Claude External Audit — KZ-2 partial, KZ-4 not done

tasks.title: Устранить 8 SSOT-дублей — конкретные пути
tasks.audit_note: GPT архивировал codex-артефакты, а не SSOT-дубли. contours_registry.json и object_passports.json всё ещё существуют в двух путях.
tasks.detail: Удалить или переместить в archive ДУБЛИ из governance/contours/, governance/providers/, governance/objects/state-copies. Canonical path = governance/state/. Конкретные дубли: governance/contours/contours_registry.json (дубль governance/state/contours_registry.json), governance/providers/providers_registry.json (дубль governance/state/providers_registry.json), governance/providers/contour_provider_policy.json, governance/channels/managed_channel_schema.json, governance/telegram/telegram_input_envelope_schema.json, governance/telegram/telegram_to_managed_channel_mapping.json. Использовать Run script с shutil.move() или Path.unlink() для дублей. Canonical в governance/state/ оставить.
tasks.example_objective:
Run script:
"""
import shutil
from pathlib import Path

duplicates = [
    'governance/contours/contours_registry.json',
    'governance/providers/providers_registry.json',
    'governance/providers/contour_provider_policy.json',
]
archive = Path('governance/archive/ssot_duplicates_real_2026-06-04')
archive.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
for dup in duplicates:
    p = Path(dup)
    if p.exists():
        dest = archive / p.name
        shutil.move(str(p), str(dest))
        changed_files.append(str(dest))
"""
No issue comments.
tasks.proof_required: governance/state/kz2_real_ssot_status.json с duplicates_remaining=0 и список конкретных файлов

tasks.title: Восстановить object_passports.json и release_proof_manifest.json
tasks.detail: Оба файла усечены. Записать полное содержимое через Run script с Path.write_text().
tasks.example_objective:
Run script:
"""
import json
from pathlib import Path

passports = {"version": "1.0", "date": "2026-06-04", "objects": [{"id": "OBJ-GD-001", "type": "general_director", "elements": ["EL-CUR-GD-001", "CNT-GD-001"]}, {"id": "OBJ-DIR-001", "type": "director", "elements": ["EL-CUR-DIR-001"]}, {"id": "OBJ-WRK-001", "type": "worker", "elements": ["WRK-C1", "WRK-C2", "WRK-C3"]}]}
Path('governance/objects/object_passports.json').write_text(json.dumps(passports, indent=2))
changed_files.append('governance/objects/object_passports.json')

manifest = {"version": "1.0", "date": "2026-06-04", "commit_sha": None, "release_pass": False, "note": "commit_sha=null until CI verified gate"}
Path('governance/release/release_proof_manifest.json').write_text(json.dumps(manifest, indent=2))
changed_files.append('governance/release/release_proof_manifest.json')

Path('governance/state/kz4_passports_status.json').write_text(json.dumps({"status": "PASS", "restored": True}, indent=2))
changed_files.append('governance/state/kz4_passports_status.json')
"""
No issue comments.
tasks.proof_required: governance/state/kz4_passports_status.json с restored=true И оба файла > 100 байт И валидный JSON
